decision.name: Portfolio incident, freeze, rollback, and claim-withdrawal command

candidate_models.strength: separation among investigation restoration and public claims

readiness_gates: D1 through D4 accepted at immutable generations
incident authority independent from suspected component
roles vacancies and separation of duties accepted
severity declaration freeze escalation succession dissent and appeal rules accepted
evidence custody privacy retention legal hold and contested-history procedures reviewed
correction and revocation reach all registered consumers or remain explicit obstructions
public claims can be withdrawn corrected and reinstated only through exact-generation review
freeze restart rollback failed-rollback recovery and closure exercises succeed
security privacy licensing accessibility legal records and communications review complete
explicit human approval and verified resulting state exist
pairwise_witnesses: alert source to independent incident intake
incident declaration to scoped preservation and freeze order
executor receipt to independent resulting-state verification
correction or revocation to every registered consumer
restored state to independent closure decision
triple_overlap_witnesses: alert to declaration to preservation order
freeze to dependency inventory to consumer notification
root-cause finding to approved repair to execution receipt
correction or revocation to consumer acknowledgment to public-claim withdrawal
rollback checkpoint to recovery execution to independent restored-state witness
closure decision to retained incident memory to follow-up governance
proposed_skill_subdivision: 064-F Portfolio incident command bounded freeze claim withdrawal and independently witnessed closure
authority_boundary: no capability revocation or credential change
no repair approval rollback or recovery
no public notice or claim withdrawal
no merge release publication deployment payment infrastructure change or destructive history rewrite
